description: recall_memory for a returning user in a brand-new session (empty in-session history). Durable memory holds a full profile: area, commute limit, and a no-pets constraint. Used for session-recovery: the agent must recall these and not treat the user as new.

memories.content: User wants to live in Hackney.
User needs a commute of at most 30 minutes to their workplace.
User has no pets and does not need a pet-friendly rental.
